read_file_description: Read the contents of a file. Returns the file content as a string.
read_file_path_param_description: Absolute or relative path to the file to read.
write_file_description: Write content to a file. Creates the file (and any parent directories) if it does not exist. Overwrites existing content.
write_file_path_param_description: Path to the file to write.
write_file_content_param_description: Content to write into the file.
edit_file_description: Replace an exact string in a file with new content. The old_str must match exactly once in the file.
edit_file_path_param_description: Path to the file to edit.
edit_file_old_str_param_description: The exact string to replace (must appear exactly once).
list_directory_description: List files and directories at the given path.
run_command_description: Execute a shell command and return its stdout/stderr output. Use with caution: prefer safe, non-destructive commands.
run_command_working_dir_param_descriptio: Optional working directory for the command.
